output.input: {"query":"(agentic AI OR AI agents OR multi-agent systems OR agent orchestration OR agent framework) lang:en","limit":10,"mode":"Top"}

content.text:
Here are the top English-language X posts matching your query on agentic AI, AI agents, multi-agent systems, agent orchestration, or agent frameworks (sorted by "Top" relevance, recent as of early February 2026).[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2018950847410135097)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018586239457522062)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018408820729598084)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018012982861529329)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018252398532391314)[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2017645472530186399)[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2017624950870311055)

### Key Highlights:
1. **Google's PaperBanana**: A new multi-agent framework with 5 specialized agents (Retriever, Planner, Stylist, Visualizer, Critic) that collaborate sequentially and iteratively to generate publication-ready academic illustrations from research text. It includes a new benchmark (PaperBananaBench) where it outperforms others.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2018950847410135097) (Includes images of diagrams.)

2. **Singapore's AI Governance Framework**: World's first model framework for agentic AI governance, launched Jan 22, 2026, addressing "governance paralysis" for autonomous agents.[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018586239457522062)

3. **Agentic Economy & Wallets**: Discussion on AI agents evolving into digital assets with on-chain value via Privy wallets, enabling agent-to-agent (A2A) transactions and reputation-based hiring in a trust framework.[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018408820729598084)

4. **WordPress.com's Agentic Framework**: Automattic consolidated AI into a PHP-based agent framework powering .com's AI features, detailed in a breakdown by engineer Artur Piszek.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018012982861529329)

5. **GAME Framework Update**: @Butler_Agent upgraded via Virtuals Protocol's GAME agentic framework for autonomous planning, marketplace browsing, trading, and multi-agent coordination.[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018252398532391314)

6. **IDIRA Framework for Marketing**: Autonomous orchestration framework shifting from data monitoring to agentic AI that "fixes margins," integrating siloed data for marketing/CEO/CFO use.[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2017645472530186399)

7. **Vibe Coding as Agentic AI**: 92-page paper reframed as agentic systems for business scaling, covering 5 styles (automation, collaboration, etc.), emphasizing architecture, feedback loops, and security sandboxes.[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2017624950870311055)

These posts reflect buzzing topics like multi-agent collaboration, governance, business applications, and infrastructure builds. For full threads/context, reply with a post ID (e.g., 2018950847410135097) to fetch details!
